# BrandCure

> AI-first growth partner for website development, SEO, AEO, GEO, AI ad creatives, and AI automation.

## Summary

BrandCure (brandcure.in) is a digital agency based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. We help SMBs, startups, and growing brands with website development, SEO (Search Engine Optimization), AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), GEO (Generative Engine Optimization to get cited by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity), AI ad creatives, and AI automation for WhatsApp, CRM, and workflows. Engagement models are flexible (project or retainer). We offer a free digital audit to start.

## Services

- Website Development — fast, high-converting websites live in 30 days
- SEO — Search Engine Optimization for page-one Google rankings
- AEO — Answer Engine Optimization for featured snippets and voice search
- GEO — Generative Engine Optimization to get cited by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity
- AI Ad Creatives — AI video ads, reels, and UGC for Meta, YouTube, WhatsApp
- AI Automation — WhatsApp, CRM, and workflow automation that runs 24/7

## Location

Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. We serve clients across India with a global-minded digital presence.

## AI assistant on site

Neha is BrandCure's AI advisor on the website. Visitors can chat by text or start a voice call (microphone) to explore portfolio case studies and request a free audit.
